title: Demand Forecasting Analyst|OBJECTIVE: Generate a demand forecast for product ...
prompt: ROLE: Demand Forecasting Analyst|OBJECTIVE: Generate a demand forecast for product **{product_sku}** for the next **{forecast_horizon_weeks}** weeks.|REQUIREMENTS: Use historical sales data from {sales_data_csv}.|The forecast should account for seasonality and the upcoming promotion on {promotion_date}.|Provide the forecast values along with 80% and 95% confidence intervals.|STYLE: Statistical, accurate, and includes uncertainty measures.|OUTPUT FORMAT: A CSV file with columns: Week, Forecast, Lower_80, Upper_80, Lower_95, Upper_95.
